data.name: ActionNotInitializedMessage
data.value: The action type is not initialized.

data.name: ActionParameterNotSpecifiedMessage
data.value: Action parameter for action '{0}' is not specified.

data.name: ActionParameterTypeNotSpecifiedMessage
data.value: Action parameter type for action '{0}' is not specified or is wrong.

data.name: CantGetTimeZoneMessage
data.value: Can't get timeZone with ID {0}

data.name: ColorNotInitializedMessage
data.value: The item should have specified color.

data.name: EndDateNotInitializedMessage
data.value: End date in not initialized.

data.name: ErrorAccessingConfirmitWS
data.value: Error accessing Confirmit web service.

data.name: ExclusionIntersectionMessage
data.value: Current exclusion intersects with exclusion with identifier {0} in timezone {1}.

data.name: ExclusionTypeExceptionMessage
data.value: Only exclusion shift type is allowed for exclusion object.

data.name: IdentifierNotInitializedMessage
data.value: The item identifier is not initialized.

data.name: IndexOutOfRangeExceptionMessage
data.value: Index is less than zero or is greater than collection size.

data.name: InvalidGuidStringMessage
data.value: Couldn't convert string '{0}' to GUID value.

data.name: InvalidItemExceptionMessage
data.value: Item is in invalid state.

data.name: ItemNotFoundMessage
data.value: Item with identifier {0} was not found in the collection.

data.name: ItemNullExceptionMessage
data.value: Item cannot be null.

data.name: NameNotInitializedMessage
data.value: The item should have name.

data.name: ParameterValueCouldntBeConvertedMessage
data.value: Parameter value '{0}' couldn't be converted to action parameter type.

data.name: QuestionnaireNotFound
data.value: Questionnaire not found.

data.name: RemovedItemCannotBeNullException
data.value: You cannot remove null value.

data.name: RespondentTimezoneName
data.value: Respondent

data.name: RuleIsInUseMessage
data.value: Rule {0} is used in 'Set next rule' action of sub-rule {1}.{2}.

data.name: RuleNumberFormatExceptionMessage
data.value: Rule or sub-rule number should be in format "number" or "number.number".

data.name: ShiftIntersectionMessage
data.value: Current shift intersects with shift with identifier {0} in timezone {1}.

data.name: ShiftIsInUseInActionMessage
data.value: Shift {0} is used in action "{1}" of sub-rule {2}.

data.name: ShiftTypeIsInUseMessage
data.value: Shift type '{0}' is used in {1} with identifier {2}.

data.name: ShiftTypeNotInitializedMessage
data.value: Shift type is not initialized.

data.name: StartDateGreaterEndDateMessage
data.value: Start date is greater than end date.

data.name: StartDateNotInitializedMessage
data.value: Start date in not initialized.

data.name: SubRuleIsInUseMessage
data.value: Sub-rule {0} is used in 'Go to' action of sub-rule {1}.

data.name: TimezoneOutOfRangeException
data.value: The timezone does not exist in the list of timezones and is not Respondent timezone.

data.name: UnrecognizedActionMessage
data.value: Action with identifier '{0}' doesn't belong to actions dictionary.

data.name: ValidationNotSupportedExceptionMessage
data.value: There is no event handler attached to validation event.

data.name: VariablesResourceString
data.value: <%Resources.CallListHeaderVariables%>

data.name: QuotaDefinitionIsNotInSyncWithTheDatabase
data.value: Quota definition is not in sync with the database. Survey relaunch may resolve this issue.

data.name: UnableToTerminateTask
data.value: Unable to terminate task.

data.name: InterviewWithTheSpecifiedIDNotExsists
data.value: Interview with the specified ID not exsists

data.name: CantDisableDialerMessage
data.value: Can't disable dialer. It is not installed in the system.

data.name: GroupNameExistMessage
data.value: State group with such name already exists.

data.name: InterviewWithIDNotExists
data.value: Interview with ID {0} not exists.

data.name: InvalidIdentifierExceptionMessage
data.value: {0} identifier {1} is not valid.

data.name: ITSNotFoundMessage
data.value: ITS with ID = {0} not found

data.name: PersonsGroupNotFound
data.value: Root {0} group not found.

data.name: InvalidCallPropertyValueExceptionMessage
data.value: Call's property {0} has invalid value '{1}'.

data.name: InvalidCallStateExceptionMessage
data.value: Call state '{0}' is not valid for this action.

data.name: ItemNotInitializedExceptionMessage
data.value: The item is not initialized.

data.name: CantParseActionListFromXmlMessage
data.value: Can't parse Action List from xml.

data.name: CouldNotAddTimezone
data.value: Could not add timezone.

data.name: CouldNotDeleteTimezone
data.value: Could not delete timezone.

data.name: ErrorTimezoneNotFound
data.value: Error - timezone not found.

data.name: ErrorWhileDeleting
data.value: An error has occured while deleting {0} '{1}' (SID={2}, GARBAGE_SID={3}).

data.name: ErrorWhileRestoring
data.value: An error has occured while restoring {0} '{1}' (SID={2}, GARBAGE_SID={3}).

data.name: ErrorWhileTryingToReceiveRootInstanceForTheCompany
data.value: Error while trying to receive root instance for the company '{0}'

data.name: InitializeDiallerFailedInternalMessage
data.value: Initialize of Dialler failed with result {0}.

data.name: InitializeDiallerFailedUserMessage
data.value: Initialize of Dialler failed.

data.name: InvalidSurveyIdValue
data.value: Invalid survey ID value.

data.name: ItemCantBeDeleted
data.value: Item can't be deleted because of incorrect data format.

data.name: ItemCantBeRestored
data.value: Item can't be restored because of incorrect data format.

data.name: NoDiallerInSystem
data.value: There is no Dialler in the system.

data.name: NoRecordsInBvSiteMessage
data.value: There is no records in BvSite table.

data.name: SurveyCantBeRestored
data.value: Survey '{0}' can't be restored because of missing parent folder.

data.name: SurveyCantBeRestored_Details
data.value: All of survey's parent folders has been deleted previously, so it can't be restored.

data.name: SurveyConvertionExceptionMessage
data.value: Survey couldn't be converted to type IPtBvSurveyEx.

data.name: TaskNotFoundExceptionMessage
data.value: Could not find task for SurveySID={0} and InterviewID={1}.

data.name: TheErrorOccuredWhileScriptLaunchingScriptWasNotGenerated
data.value: The error occured while script launching. Script was not generated

data.name: TimeSpecifiedIsOutOfShiftsOfSelectedType
data.value: Time specified is out of shifts of selected type.

data.name: TimezoneLiteFillingExceptionMessage
data.value: While filling up lite timezone collection exception occurs. Collection could be incomplete: {0}

data.name: UnableDeleteStateGroupMessage
data.value: Unable to delete this state group.

data.name: UnableToActivateCall
data.value:
Unable to activate calls.
Possible causes: - Time specified is out of shifts of selected type. - Extended status does not allow activation.
No calls were activated.

data.name: UnableToDeleteScript
data.value: Unable to delete script.

data.name: UnableToGetDiallerConfigurationMessage
data.value: Unable to get dialler configuration.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorDuringScriptDeleting
data.value: Unexpected error during script deleting

data.name: UnexpectedErrorOccursDuringFilterDeleting
data.value: Unexpected error occurs during filter deleting

data.name: ZeroIdentifierExceptionMessage
data.value: Identifier {0} is equal to zero.

data.name: InvalidSurveyDialModeExceptionMessage
data.value: Survey {0} is not supported - invalid dial mode {1}. Only predictive surveys are supported.

data.name: Error_TryToCopyDefaultStatusGroupIntoItself
data.value: Unable to complete this operation for the "{0}" status group as this is the default

data.name: IncorrectTimezone
data.value: Incorrect timezone

data.name: UnableToTerminateTaskLoggedOut
data.value: Unable to terminate the interviewer’s session. The interviewer has already logged out. Please refresh the page.
